title: Custom Programs
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Custom Programs
NYU Shanghai designs and delivers custom non-degree training programs for organizations seeking to cultivate intellectual curiosity and develop global talent and strategic capabilities in China and beyond. Drawing on the university’s world-class faculty, bilingual teaching environment, state-of-the-art campus, and interdisciplinary strengths across business, technology, social science, and professional practice, each program is tailored to client goals—whether to deepen leadership capacity, navigate digital transformation, or foster cross-cultural collaboration. NYU Shanghai is your bridge between cutting-edge academic insight and real-world practice, creating transformative learning experiences for companies, public institutions, and non-profit organizations alike.
With each collaboration, our professional team of academic designers and administrators will work with you through an iterative process of discovery and co-creation to develop a bespoke program of curated lectures, executive education workshops, tailored trainings, and on-campus experiences that will inspire engagement.
Below is a sampling of modules that could be customized and taught for organizational partners. We invite you to contact us at shanghai.nondegree@nyu.edu for a discussion about how NYU Shanghai and our faculty can partner with your group to explore even more possibilities.
Cutting-Edge Technology and Smart Innovation
AI for Supply Chain, Production Optimization, and Logistics
Human-AI Collaboration and Decision Augmentation
Robotics and Embodied AI for Manufacturing
Data Intelligence and Sustainable Development
Business Acumen
Doing Business in China
Business Applications of AI and Big Data
Sustainable Business Practices
Chinese Financial Markets
Business Communication
New Venture Strategy
Retail Technology
Management Skills and Leadership
Digital Marketing and Brand Innovation
Global Perspective
International Trade / Relations
Political Economy of East Asia
Market Risk Insights in a Changing World
Entrepreneurship and Globalization
Mindset and Media
Design Thinking
Creativity and Innovation
New Media and Technology
Exploring Digital Literacy
Shared Humanity
New Pathways in Education: International Perspectives and Future Talent Development
The Universality of Music
Expanding Our View of the Universe: New Discoveries in Space
Developmental Psychology and Socio-Emotional Learning
